textByHash.8501ad608608020e22316b073c84bd29a8bbc159: Sssss! Thou art brave to wander so far into the domain of Kardia, mine mistress!
textByHash.de772cae531ec0ecf1c4da6f48f3a14a69ebdd8c: But soon thou shalt become a soulless servant of Lord Iban, like all who come here.
textByHash.87d1bca8f1986e8a6746ece50c26da64376778fd: Glad shall mine heart be when I see thee prostrate thineself before the altars of Zamorak the Mighty.
